headline: Video: Tesla Model Y Wades Past Gas Car On Flooded China Road; Elon Musk Cheers
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk on Thursday showed his approval for a video doing the rounds on social media that shows how the electric vehicle maker’s Model Y's capability to wade through water.

headline: 'Jurassic World Dominion' Stomps On 'Lightyear' At The Weekend Box Office
summary: In cinematic duel between dinosaurs and astronauts resulted in an upset victory for the dinosaurs as “Jurassic World Dominion” topped the U.S. weekend box office for a consecutive week while the premiere engagement of “Lightyear” achieved a less-than-stellar second-place ranking.

headline: Maryland Apple Store Workers Become The First To Unionize In US: What They Told CEO Tim Cook
summary: Employees at an Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) retail store in Maryland have voted to join a union. As a result, the store is now the first unionized Apple Store in the U.S.

headline: Not So Happy Father's Day: Elon Musk Reminisces About His Estranged Dad, And His 'Bleak' Childhood
summary: Fathers are a very special in anybody's life, and words often fall short when we attempt to describe the kind of inspiration they provide and the support they lend to our lives.

headline: Why Does Elon Musk Feel 'Swindled' When He Drinks This Sparkling Water Brand?
Elon Musk Does It Again! Endorses Dogecoin, Says He'll Keep Buying The Meme Coin
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has again shown his support for Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE).
